summary: Horizontal video, a Fox News 'Special Report' EXCLUSIVE sit-down in which anchor Bret Baier interviews Sec. Kristi Noem at a wood-paneled office desk about the terrorist threat and the Trump immigration agenda. Lower-thirds read 'THREAT ASSESSMENT / DEPARTMENT EFFORTS TO KEEP AMERICANS SAFE' with LIVE and BREAKING TONIGHT banners. The audio is the anchor and official talking, with no music.
notable_text: BORDER POLICIES - EFFORTS TO IMPLEMENT TRUMP IMMIGRATION AGENDA; THREAT ASSESSMENT - DEPARTMENT EFFORTS TO KEEP AMERICANS SAFE; KRISTI NOEM | HOMELAND SECURITY SECRETARY; EXCLUSIVE; BREAKING TONIGHT
